team_name: SaakshyaNet — AI-Powered Tender Evaluation and Bid Eligibility Intelligence Platform
summary: Design an AI platform for tender evaluation and eligibility analysis in government procurement, capable of processing various document formats, extracting values, making decisions using rule-based and machine learning systems, providing transparent explanations, and generating immutable audit records.
key_steps: Ingestion of tender documents and bids
Evaluation using rule-based and LLM systems
optimization_claims: Improved efficiency in tender evaluation process
